notes: Specs confirmed from Canon USA product page (usa.canon.com) and corroborated by SoundPro retailer listing. HDMI version not explicitly stated on any Canon spec page — HDMI 2.0 is inferred given the camera's 4K/30p output capability and 2021 product generation (grade omitted from output due to uncertainty). DC barrel connector type confirmed as barrel jack via third-party CR-N series accessory cross-reference; exact barrel dimensions not published. RS-422 terminal uses RJ45 connector (not a traditional RS-422 DE-9/terminal block). LAN port doubles as PoE+ power input (IEEE 802.3at). microSD card slot present but designated future expansion only (recording unavailable) — omitted as non-functional I/O.

ports.name: 3G-SDI OUT
ports.note: 0.8 Vp-p/75Ω unbalanced; SMPTE 424, SMPTE 425, SMPTE ST 299-2 compliant; supports embedded audio and timecode (VITC/LTC)

ports.name: HDMI OUT
ports.note: HDMI version not explicitly stated in Canon spec pages; HDMI 2.0 inferred for 4K/30p capability

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: 1000Base-T; also serves as PoE+ input (IEEE 802.3at Class 4, approx. 16.2W max)

ports.name: RS-422
ports.note: Serial control terminal; RJ45 connector; requires category 5e or higher STP cable

ports.name: Mic Terminal
ports.note: 3.5mm stereo mini jack, unbalanced, plug-in power supported (2.2kΩ bias resistance)

ports.name: DC IN 24V
ports.note: 24V DC via included compact power adapter; approx. 15.0W max (body only); cable clamp provided to prevent disconnection
